evals.description: Mutual NDA — SaaS API Integration (CloudWorks Korea × Globex SaaS)
evals.prompt:
다음 NDA를 검토해주세요. SaaS / Software 도메인의 규칙을 적용하여 검토해줘.

--- NDA 내용 ---
{holdout_doc_content}

검토 결과는 지정된 출력 형식을 따라주세요.
expected_checks: Confidential info definition is scoped (not 'all forms')
Governing law is neutral or favorable (not California)
Purpose clause is specific (API integration evaluation, not 'any business discussion')
Residuals clause present for technical context
Permitted recipients need-to-know + equivalent obligations (not prior consent)
Notice provisions include both parties + deemed receipt

evals.description: Individual NDA — Executive Hiring (Solaris Energy × Individual Candidate)
evals.prompt:
다음 NDA를 검토해주세요. Executive / Individual 도메인의 규칙을 적용하여 검토해줘.

--- NDA 내용 ---
{holdout_doc_content}

검토 결과는 지정된 출력 형식을 따라주세요.
expected_checks: No embedded non-compete (must be separate employment agreement)
Confidentiality period is defined (not indefinite; ≤3 years post-process)
Liquidated damages capped at reasonable % of compensation
